title: Warping & Wizard's Twilight
rule: Warping Score rises like an Ability but by Warping Points. To raise the score by one, gain 5 × the new score in extra points. Points from any realm are not distinguished.
sources: Living in a strong (6+) supernatural aura (rate by aura table; not if the aura matches your own realm).
Being subjected to a powerful supernatural effect (any Hermetic spell of 6th magnitude or higher) not designed for you.
Being constantly under an active supernatural effect — 1 point/year per effect (a Longevity Ritual counts).
Botching a roll to use a supernatural ability (1 point per 0 on the botch dice).
twilight_note: For a magus, gaining Warping (especially from a supernatural botch, or when the Score crosses a threshold) can trigger Wizard's Twilight — roll per the Twilight rules (Ch.7, Dangers). Creatures with Might are immune to Warping.
